title: How do I automatically change the priority column on my board to critical, if a seperate column tiled overdue days - which has been calculated by a formula, has a specific number? E.G If overdue by 7 days, the priority changes to critical.

posts.cookedHtml: How do I automatically change the priority column on my board to critical, if a seperate column tiled overdue days - which has been calculated by a formula, has a specific number? E.G If overdue by 7 days, the priority changes to critical.
